truth_check_history.note: This truth-check verified only step 1 (the revert PR). post-merge-lane-close.yml auto-closed the issue prematurely because PR #1185's body included a 'Closes UTV2-1519' marker before step 2 had landed -- an authoring mistake in this lane's own PR bodies, not a tooling bug. Reopened; see reopen_history.

reopen_history.reason: Step 1 (revert PR #1185) merged and its 'Closes UTV2-1519' marker auto-closed the issue prematurely -- this issue's acceptance criteria require both step 1 (revert) and step 2 (re-land via governed PR), and step 2 had not yet landed. Reopened to continue as step 2 under the same issue.

notes: Docs-only-fast-path was attempted first for step 1 (per dispatch.md) but CI's file-scope-lock-check.yml and tier-label-check.yml both hard-require a lane manifest to exist regardless of the fast-path exemption, so a manifest was added after the fact -- same pattern as the UTV2-1512/1513 backfill precedent. This is itself a gap in the T3 fast-path implementation (CI enforcement not matching dispatch.md's documented behavior) worth a follow-up issue, out of scope for this correction. Step 2 (this PR, #1186) reuses the manifest directly rather than re-running preflight/lane-start, since PL5 would correctly refuse a second lane-start while this issue's lane is still active. Step 1's PR body mistakenly included a 'Closes UTV2-1519' marker, causing a premature auto-close between the two steps -- corrected via reopen_history above; step 2's PR body correctly carries the actual closing marker.

scope_override.reason: file-scope-guard.ts trusts the base/main copy of this manifest for scope resolution by default; main's copy currently shows status=done from the premature auto-close after step 1 (PR #1185), which the guard reads as no active lane on this branch. This head-tip override documents that the lane is genuinely still active (step 2 of 2, reopened per reopen_history above) and is not scope-widening -- file_scope_lock is unchanged from step 1/2.
scope_override.evidence: https://github.com/griff843/Unit-Talk-v2/pull/1186 + reopen_history/truth_check_history fields in this same manifest
